title: Non Slip Baby Bath Mats With Suction Pads Pack Of 16 Mini Child Safety Anti Slip Shower Mats Flower, Star, Foot, Star Fish (Funny Foot)
features: Every child loves to splash around and play in the bath, but that can often put them at risk of slipping over and injuring themselves. These colourful Baby Pipkin Mini Bath Mats with a non-slip texture and suction pads can be used in baths and showers to prevent accidents, alllowing your child to play safely in water. They come in variety of fun shapes, allowing essential safety product to become an important part of bath time fun & games!
This Baby Pipkin 16 Mini Non-Slip Bath Mats are available in 4 different shapes – Star Fish, Funny Foot, Star and Flower. NOTE – ONLY ONE SET OF 16 IN YOUR CHOSEN SHAPE SHALL BE SENT OUT.

MINI BATH MATS WITH SUCTION PADS – To ensure each mat is held firmly in place and easy fitting, the base surface has suction pads. Suction pads will not only hold each mat in place but also allow each mat to easily be re-positioned and even be completely removed so that you can give them a quick clean.

NON-SLIP TEXTURE MINI BATH MATS – Along with a suction pad base, the main bath mats surface is designed to be soft and textured surface to prevent slips. Suction pads with the soft textured surface will provide double the safety for your child while they enjoy there bath/shower.

FUN WHILE IN THE BATH/SHOWER – These safety non slip mini bath mats are designed so that your child can also enjoy bath/shower time. They come in eye-catching colours and playful designs, which children love and give you the opportunity to tell stories or even play games. They are a great way to develop your childrens skills and grow there imagination.
